goal: Write a 3-section product overview for a B2B SaaS invoicing tool targeting freelancers.

tasks.title: Write the problem statement section
tasks.inputs: Target audience: freelancers. Pain point: chasing late payments and manual invoice creation.
tasks.expected_output: 2–3 paragraph section describing the problem freelancers face with invoicing today.
acceptance_criteria: Describes at least 2 distinct pain points

tasks.title: Write the solution overview section
tasks.inputs: Product: SaaS invoicing tool. Key features: automated reminders, one-click invoice generation, payment tracking dashboard.
tasks.expected_output: 2–3 paragraph section explaining how the product solves the problems described in task-001.
acceptance_criteria: References the problem framing from task-001
Mentions all 3 key features by name
Uses plain, non-technical language suitable for non-developer freelancers

tasks.title: Write the call-to-action section
tasks.inputs: CTA goal: sign up for a free 14-day trial. Tone: confident but not pushy.
tasks.expected_output: 1 short paragraph (30–60 words) with a clear call to action.
acceptance_criteria: Contains a direct call to action with the phrase 'free trial' or '14-day trial'
